entries.question: framework self-audit で次に残る gap は何か
entries.answer: organization-audit still fails on a pre-existing historical task-id collision: TASK-005 exists as two semantically different lifecycle records across open and done, so runtime history needs explicit reconciliation rather than silent auto-repair.
entries.expectation_state: v2.3 operator-facing surfaces are now implemented, task mutation safety is hardened, and the test suite is green with 116 passing tests.
entries.mismatch_state: organization-audit still fails on a pre-existing historical task-id collision: TASK-005 exists as two semantically different lifecycle records across open and done, so runtime history needs explicit reconciliation rather than silent auto-repair.
entries.scale_direction: Treat TASK-017 as the next blocking cleanup, decide canonical history handling for TASK-005, and then resume v2.4 execution packet work from a clean runtime baseline.
